failure.error_msg: Expected valid_out to be high! assert Logic('0') == 1 + where Logic('0') = LogicObject(titan_x5_alu.valid_out).value + where LogicObject(titan_x5_alu.valid_out) = HierarchyObject(titan_x5_alu).valid_out
Divider should be busy! assert Logic('1') == 0 + where Logic('1') = LogicObject(titan_x5_alu.ready_out).value + where LogicObject(titan_x5_alu.ready_out) = HierarchyObject(titan_x5_alu).ready_out
